SA Ventures Private Limited
SAVE
Who We Are

A Legacy of Fine Spirits, Delivered with Precision

SA Ventures Private Limited is a premier liquor importer and distributor, bringing world-class spirits from France, Scotland, Holland and beyond to discerning markets across India, the Middle East and Australia.

With an authorised tie-up with TASMAC (Tamil Nadu) and established distribution in Kerala, Puducherry, Oman, UAE and Australia, we are a trusted bridge between globally recognised distilleries and regional consumers.

Our philosophy — Quality · Tradition · Passion · Trust — defines every bottle in our portfolio.

Find Our Products

TASMAC Elite Shops — Tamil Nadu

Our products are currently available at TASMAC Elite outlets in Chennai, Coimbatore and Kancheepuram. Walk in and ask for SA Ventures brands. Opening hours: 12 noon – 10 PM daily.

Our Purpose

Vision & Mission

🌟
Vision

To become a globally recognised beverage distribution group, building strong international brands across India and expanding into multiple high-growth markets worldwide.

We envision a structured global network connecting premium European producers with dynamic consumer markets — positioning our portfolio brands as trusted names across retail, HORECA and duty-free channels.

🚀
Mission
  • Establish and scale portfolio brands across India through strong distribution partnerships
  • Expand into new international markets with structured compliance and logistics
  • Develop exclusive territory collaborations built on trust and long-term growth
  • Curate high-quality imported spirits, wines and beers tailored to regional needs
  • Create lasting value for suppliers, distributors and retail partners worldwide
Get In Touch

Partner or Enquire

Whether you are a retailer, distributor, government buyer or industry partner — we would love to hear from you.
